title: PM Workfront Review-Action Grouping
objective: Tighten local frontend-only PM workfront review-action scan ergonomics by grouping eligible row-level Review escalation, Review task, Review package, Review snapshot, and Review history actions into stable accessible issue-review and work-review groups while preserving existing hrefs, return context, and zero-mutation posture.
orchestration_inputs: PM Lane 012 remains the deployment gate for hosted mutation-seam parity and live PM proof.
PM Lane 025 identified review-action scan ergonomics as the next local product slice after completing workfront snapshot-review drillthrough.

Read-only product scout 019e2cd9-c60c-7972-9d1f-477891a29371 confirmed the grouped region should be split into Issue review and Work review groups, omit empty groups, and keep Draft lead follow-up outside the grouping.
Read-only governance scout 019e2cd9-c668-7441-ba1e-ef278ae7607a supplied packet, status, validation, guardrail, and host parity closeout wording for a local frontend-only Lane 026.
Coordinator execution kept write ownership local to operations-web frontend, focused browser proof, and governance surfaces while scouts ran as parallel read-only lanes.
constrained_outputs: PM workfront now computes eligible review links into typed review actions without changing destination URL generation.
Rows with review actions now render a stable accessible Review actions region.
Issue-oriented actions render under an Issue review group for Review escalation and Review history.
Work-oriented actions render under a Work review group for Review task, Review package, and Review snapshot.
Empty groups and rows with no review actions are omitted.

The focused PM workfront smoke asserts grouped regions, issue/work group labels, link counts, generated hrefs, absence of empty groups, absence of a review-action region for rows with no review actions, downstream return links, and zero-mutation posture.
